falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 12% rebound from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this threshold would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish reversal contrary to the pattern's implied bearish bias.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current: 39) with a 20% increase in volatility (CBOE VIX > 30) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of a prolonged consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Nasdaq 100 breaks below 12,000 (a 25% decline from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp bearish breakout would falsify the pattern's implied 'bottom' characteristics, proving the current call's failure to predict a deeper correction.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
